payload.title: Add event emission for session mutations
payload.description: Wire session lifecycle mutations (work_started, chat_started, idled, ended, task_completed, recapped, hidden) through endless-event. Required before projection can rebuild sessions table.

payload.title: Add event emission for project mutations
payload.description: Wire project mutations (registered, updated, renamed, unregistered, purged) through endless-event. Required before projection can rebuild projects table.

payload.title: Add event emission for note, conversation, and message mutations
payload.description: Wire remaining entity mutations through endless-event. Required before full DB rebuild is possible.

payload.title: Record that local E-# IDs are machine-specific and stable only within single-machine replay
payload.description: During projection rebuild, task IDs are preserved by INSERTing with explicit IDs from event entity.id. E-#s never change on a single machine. For multi-machine merge, E-816 (paired identifiers with global content-hash) is required to resolve ID collisions. Local E-#s become machine-specific display aliases for the global ID. Decided 2026-04-27.

payload.title: Add reconcile-db command for case-by-case DB repair from events
payload.description: Middle ground between validate-db (read-only) and rebuild-db (nuclear). Compares event-projected state to current DB, shows mismatches, and offers to import missing tasks or update changed fields with user approval.

payload.title: Enforce task and decision recording via hooks
